case_title: THEODORE TERENCE HO VS. LIJING ZHOU

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISIONER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY HO, THEODORE TERENCE ZHOU, LIJING

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HO, THEODORE TERENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHOU, LIJING $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, DECISION INCLUDES AN AWARD OF STATUTORY DAMAGES PURSUANT TO CCP 1950.5(L) FOR BAD FAITH, RETENTION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR NOV-10-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
TRIAL BRIEF OF RESPONDENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ZHOU, LIJING AS TO PLAINTIFF HO, THEODORE TERENCE
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-10-2016 BY PRO TEM JUDGE DIANA KRUZE (DEPT. 525).
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBIT TRANSFER FROM SMALL CLAIMS DEPT)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY HO, THEODORE TERENCE ZHOU, LIJING
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-10-2016 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2016 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. DEFENDANT MS.LIJING ZHOU DOES NOT OWE PLAINTIFF MR. THEODORE TERENCE HO ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEPTEMBER 30, 2016. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. PRO TEM JUDGE: DIANA KRUZE; CLERK: M.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HO, THEODORE TERENCE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHOU, LIJING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT ZHOU, LIJING RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF HO, THEODORE TERENCE SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT ZHOU, LIJING MAILED TO RESPONDENT HO, THEODORE TERENCE

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:12 A.M.: THIS CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DATE FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL AS REGULARLY SCHEDULED WITH BOTH PARTIES PRESENT IN THE COURTROOM. ATTORNEY MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER, ESQ. IS ALSO PRESENT AND APPEARS ON BEHALF OF RESPONDENT MS. LIJING ZHOU WHO ALSO APPEARS.
THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH AND HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES WITH REGARD TO THE CAUSE AND ASKS AND RECEIVES ADDITIONAL INFORMATION UNTIL 11:21 A.M.

11:53 A.M.: THEREUPON, AFTER HEARING ALL INFORMATION PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND AFTER INQUIRING AND RECEIVING ADDITIONAL FACTS AND EXHIBITS INFORMATION FROM BOTH SIDES, THE COURT THEREUPON INFORMS BOTH SIDES THEY WILL BE NOTIFIED OF THE COURT'S DECISION BY MAIL AND THEN TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

12:00 P.M.: COURT IS ADJOURNED.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Judgment Entered
